title: Woodluv Storage Baskets Set of 2, Storage Baskets for Shelves, Hand-Woven Storage Boxes, Display Hamper Basket, Storage Organiser for Bedroom Bathroom Home or Office
features: ★ ROBUST CONSTRUCTION - This set of 2 square water hyacinth shelf storage baskets is handwoven by skilled artisans in China using a sturdy metal frame. Water hyacinth is strong but lightweight, making it an ideal material for basket-weaving.
★ MULTI-PURPOSE BASKETS - Great for storing a range of items. Ideal for stationery, accessories, baby clothing, beauty products, letters, paperwork and general bits & bobs
★ COLLAPSIBLE DESIGN - Fold away when not in use
★ EASY CARRY HANDLE- The sturdy handles look completely gorgeous with the carefully woven water hyacinth material - and make the basket incredibly easy to carry around the home.
★ PRODUCT DIMENSION (L x WX H) - 26 x 26 x 13cm
description: Product Description Elegant Handwoven Set of 2 Water Hyacinth Shelf Storage Collapsible Basket Introducing our multipurpose storage basket, a handwoven masterpiece crafted from Water Hyacinth and features a collapsible design. This set of 2 baskets is not only a functional storage solution, but also a stylish addition to any room. Versatile Storage: Multi-Purpose Basket Chic Handwoven Basket for Bathroom, Bedroom, or Shelves Whether you're looking to organize your bathroom, bedroom, or office, this versatile basket fits perfectly on shelves and adds a touch of natural elegance to your décor. Ideal for displaying items or keeping clutter at bay, it effortlessly combines practicality with aesthetic appeal. Durable and Decorative Storage Basket Stylish Basket For Making a Perfect Gift Hamper Our Multi-Purpose Storage Basket is not only a versatile and stylish storage solution, but it also makes an excellent gift hamper basket. Handwoven from a beautiful and durable natural fibre, this basket is designed to impress. Its natural, rustic charm adds a touch of elegance to any gift presentation, making it perfect for various occasions. Streamline Your Space: Sturdy and Stylish Handwoven Display Hamper Designed with versatility in mind, our storage basket seamlessly integrates into various decor styles. Perfect to complements a range of colour schemes, while its compact size fits neatly on shelves, in cabinets, or under tables, maximizing space efficiency without compromising on style.
